A. The agents correctly identify the answer, but the process is overly verbose and repetitive. The problem solver and code executor essentially state the same conclusion in different ways, and the verifier simply confirms their agreement without adding any independent verification or insight. There's a lot of unnecessary back-and-forth and restatement of the obvious.
